_comment: SYNTHETIC fixture — NOT a real capture. This project is static-analysis-only and has NO real device-list capture. Every value here is obviously-fake (SYNTH_* / synth-* prefixes), so there is no PII/secret/anonymization concern. It exists only to exercise the typed serde models in babymonitor-core::device against the documented Tuya bean shape (re/tuya_cloud_auth.md §5). Field names match the atop camelCase wire shape.
